preamble: The transformation of [d] to [ts] involves a combination of devoicing and assibilation, often seen in historical developments or loanword adaptations.

examples.note: Devoicing and assibilation during adaptation into languages without [d] but with [ts].

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
Schenker, A. M. (1995). The Dawn of Slavic.
